tg.reliability: genuine gross overestimate where resolved, but IRREPRODUCIBLE (rigid-aromatic; PEEK4 ±50 K sweep-to-sweep at fixed rate)
tg.tg_note: killed bogus 468.6 'rate_extrapolated' (slope-gate FALSE pass: b=+2.67~=0 on r2=0.002 noise fit). 468.6 was the ONLY near-exp PEEK Tg in the set -- a noise artifact. PEEK4 looked like the best replicate but was the most misleading.. Raw 533.6 K vs exp 418 K = FAIL (+21.6%): LARGEST overestimate of any class (rigid-aromatic PCFF + cooling-rate + screening-melt). PEEK is between PSU (resolved->genuine) and PVC (degenerate->unreliable).

density.density_note: MARGINAL FAIL: -5.2% vs amorphous 1.263 = documented PKTN PCFF underdensity, just past the -5% floor. Honest +/-5% band (NOT the 1.150-floor band -- that band-loosening is superseded by this review's +/-5% standard). Density is NOT a headline PASS for PEEK.

bulk_modulus.method_note: Murnaghan primary (uniform B0' in [4,20] gate). PASS but note fluctuation 4.5293 vs Murnaghan 5.1315 = 11.7% gap (larger than PSU's <=3.4%; both still in-band). K is the headline (closest property) but only 3/4 PASS -- PEEK1 reads low. No property passes all four.

provenance.review_note: PEEK replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: weakest aromatic set, NO property passes all 4. K headline (3/4 PASS; PEEK1 deform low). Density marginal FAIL x4 (-5% PKTN underdensity). Tg FAIL x4 (+20-26%, genuine-but-irreproducible). PEEK4 468.6 was a slope-gate noise artifact.
